orgs.title: Organizations
orgs.name: Name

users.title: Users
users.name: Name
users.passwordKeep: Leave blank to keep the current password.

keys.title: API keys
keys.label: Label
keys.deleteConfirm: Delete this API key? Clients using it stop working.
keys.created: API key created — copy it now, it is shown only once.
keys.rotateHint: Keys can't be edited — to rotate, generate a new one and delete the old.

access.title: Access
access.permissionsHint: Glob patterns on route/alias names this scope may call (union across org→team→user; no match anywhere = denied).
access.noPermissions: No route permissions for this scope.
access.rateLimitsHint: Per-scope limits; the strictest of org/team/user applies.
access.noRateLimits: No rate limits for this scope.
access.quotaHint: Cost ceiling for this scope (decimal). cost_used is accumulated by billing.
access.deleteQuotaConfirm: Clear the quota for this scope?
